text:
Yesterday we introduced Muse Spark, giving you a smarter, more capable Meta AI.

Muse Spark currently powers the Meta AI app and website, and will be rolling out to @whatsapp, @instagram, @facebook, @messenger, and AI glasses soon.

A few highlights from March:

- We announced our plan to release four new generations of custom MTIA silicon chips to power our AI workloads,

- Rolled out the Meta AI support assistant on @facebook and @instagram, 

- Launched the Creator Fast Track program to help creators grow on @facebook, 

- and more.

Our AI glasses are constantly getting more useful, helpful, and intuitive 👓 Our latest software updates include nutrition tracking, @whatsapp summaries and recall by Meta AI, Neural Handwriting, and more.

Our next-gen data center in El Paso, Texas is getting some upgrades:

• $10B+ investment
• Scaling to 1 gigawatt of compute power
• Supporting 4,000+ construction jobs & 300 operational jobs

Link in bio for the full story.
We’re introducing new WhatsApp features that make it even easier to manage your conversations by clearing space chat-by-chat, expanding multiple accounts to iOS, and more.
Today we’re launching the Creator Fast Track program, designed to help creators accelerate their growth and success on @facebook with guaranteed pay and increased content reach.

We’re sharing our progress on rewarding @facebook creators who post original content in addition to our updated guidelines to help creators understand the difference between original and unoriginal content on Facebook.
New Meta AI-powered tools on @facebook Marketplace make selling faster and easier than ever.
Today we’re launching new tools on @whatsapp and @messenger to help protect against scams.

Meta’s AI-optimized data centers are an investment in the future of the US economy, and we’re committed to supporting the communities where we have data centers through responsible energy use, job creation, water stewardship, philanthropic giving, and more.

A few highlights from February: 

We announced partnerships with NVIDIA and AMD, introduced a new way to customize your @threads feed, launched Meta AI-powered features to get creative on @facebook, and more.
Get to know (some of) the recipients of our 2026 Data Center Community Action Grants.
